outcome: The app is usable on mobile viewports: navigation, repository overview, evolution details, dialogs, and snapshot/session/detail pages reflow without horizontal overflow.

added.description: EVE UI layouts adapt to phone-width viewports without page-level horizontal scrolling.

changed.description: Desktop-only sidebars, detail rails, dialogs, and fixed grids collapse or scroll appropriately on mobile while preserving desktop density.

verification.reference: Playwright 375px checks showed home/detail scrollWidth equals viewport width and mobile rails are static
